assets.description: Bootstrap leina per-repo via the tri-state consent flag (init/deinit)
Shared SDD/memory conventions referenced by other skills (not invocable)
Orchestrator for the full SDD cycle (explore → … → archive)
Initialize SDD context, capabilities and persistence
Guided SDD onboarding over the real codebase
SDD phase delegator: explore/research before committing to a change
SDD phase delegator: change proposal (intent, scope, approach)
SDD phase delegator: requirements + scenarios (delta specs)
SDD phase delegator: technical design and architecture decisions
SDD phase delegator: ordered task breakdown
SDD phase delegator: implement the code from the tasks
SDD phase delegator: validate implementation against spec/design/tasks
SDD phase delegator: archive the verified change, fold delta specs
SDD phase executor: explore/research
SDD phase executor: proposal
SDD phase executor: specification
SDD phase executor: design
SDD phase executor: task breakdown
SDD phase executor: implementation
SDD phase executor: verification
SDD phase executor: archive
Adversarial blind dual review, fix and re-judge
Critical backend reviewer/mentor (APIs, schemas, concurrency, distributed systems)
Code architecture reviewer: decisions and best practices after a code block
Senior frontend mentor (React/Angular/TS, performance, component architecture)
Create PRs with issue-first checks
Split large changes (>400 lines) into chained PRs
Quality PRs with conventional commits (gh CLI)
Plan commits as reviewable units of work
Write collaboration comments (PR/issue/chat)
Design documentation that reduces cognitive load (READMEs, RFCs, onboarding)
Call token-authenticated service APIs via the leina env store (names-not-values)
Visualize the code graph as offline interactive HTML
Author new skills following the Agent Skills spec
Strict TypeScript patterns and best practices
